description: Per-tailnet view of an OctraVPN node. NOTE: most tailnet-scoped metrics (member count, IP allocator utilization, join/leave rate, magic-DNS query rate) are not yet exposed by NodeMetrics. This dashboard is wired so those panels drop in once the metrics land — until then most panels are TODO placeholders.

options.content:
Expose `octravpn_tailnet_members{tailnet_id=...}` (gauge) by reading from `WireState`'s member registry once per scrape interval. **DO NOT** label by member node-key — cardinality blow-up; the spec correctly forbids high-cardinality session-id-style labels.

Wiring point: control.rs `metrics()` handler — extend to consult `wire_state.as_ref().map(|ws| ws.member_count())`.

Expose `octravpn_tailnet_ip_allocator_used` and `octravpn_tailnet_ip_allocator_capacity` (gauges) from `WireState`'s allocator. Useful both as a single-node utilization gauge and (in this dashboard) as a per-tailnet view via `tailnet_id` label.

Low priority for v0 — the interop test uses a /24 with two machines, so utilization is effectively 0.

Counters to add to `NodeMetrics`:

- `tailnet_member_joins_total{tailnet_id}`
- `tailnet_member_leaves_total{tailnet_id}`

Increment at the `WireState` register/unregister entry points. Then plot `rate(...[5m])` here.

Magic-DNS is **not implemented** on the OctraVPN control plane today (see `docs/tailscale-interop-blocker.md`). Once the DNS responder lands, expose `tailnet_magicdns_queries_total{tailnet_id,result}` and plot `rate(...[5m])` partitioned by `result=hit|miss|nxdomain`.

Wiring is one-line at the `mint_preauth` handler (control.rs:691) and wherever `PreauthMinter::redeem` lands. Two counters:

- `preauth_mints_total{tailnet_id}`
- `preauth_redemptions_total{tailnet_id,result}`

Until then, the `/admin/preauth` endpoint is invisible to monitoring — only the audit log records it.

panels.title: Node uptime (sanity)
panels.description: Same series as the overview dashboard; included here so a tailnet operator can confirm the node serving their tailnet is up.

panels.title: Sessions on this instance
panels.description: octravpn_active_sessions — proxy for tailnet activity until per-tailnet metrics land.

list.name: tailnet_id
list.label: Tailnet ID (placeholder — no metric labelled by tailnet_id is exposed yet)

title: OctraVPN — Tailnet
